Class Hero

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.characters.Hero
All Implemented Interfaces:
Character
public final class Hero extends Object implements Character
Represents the main character played by the user. The hero has a backpack, stats (HP, Mana, Energy), a position in the dungeon, and a score. The initial stats are loaded from a JSON file.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Hero(String username)
    Creates a default hero (PURSE type) at position (0,0).

    Creates a new Hero instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • Hero

      public Hero(String username, HeroType heroType, BackPack backpack, Coordinate position, Level lvl)
      Creates a new Hero instance. * @param username the name of the player.
      Parameters:
      heroType - the class/type of the hero.
      backpack - the inventory of the hero.
      position - the initial coordinates in the map.
      lvl - the current level object tracking XP.

    • Hero

      public Hero(String username)
      Creates a default hero (PURSE type) at position (0,0).
      Parameters:
      username - the name of the player.

  • Method Details

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Checks if the character is alive.
      Specified by:
      isAlive in interface Character
      Returns:
      true if pv > 0, false otherwise.

      public int pv()
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Returns the current health points (PV) of the character.

    • protection

      public int protection()
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Returns the current protection (armor) value. Protection absorbs damage before health is reduced.
      Specified by:
      protection in interface Character
      Returns:
      the protection value.

      Parameters:

      public int score()

    • backpack

      public BackPack backpack()

    • position

      public Coordinate position()

    • heal

      public void heal(int amount)
      Heals the hero by a specified amount. Cannot exceed maxPv.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of PV to restore.

    • gainXp

      public void gainXp(int amount)
      Gives XP to the hero and levels up if the threshold is reached. Also increases backpack space and stats on level up.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of XP to gain.

    • addScore

      public void addScore(int amount)
      Adds points to the hero's current score.
      Parameters:
      amount - the score to add.

    • getTotalProtection

      public int getTotalProtection()
      Calculates the total protection provided by items in the backpack (excluding shields which are active items).
      Returns:
      total passive protection.

    • computeFinalScore

      public long computeFinalScore()
      Calculates the final score for the leaderboard. Combines score, max PV, and the value of items in the backpack.
      Returns:
      the computed final score.

    • useEnergy

      public void useEnergy(int amount)
      Consumes energy.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of energy to use.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is negative.

    • addEnergy

      public void addEnergy(int amount)
      Adds energy to the hero, capped at 3.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of energy to add.

    • useMana

      public void useMana(int amount)
      Consumes mana.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of mana to use.

    • addMana

      public void addMana(int amount)
      Adds mana to the hero.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of mana to add.

    • addItem

      public boolean addItem(Item item, Coordinate click)
      Adds an item to the backpack at a specific location.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to add.
      click - the coordinate in the bag.
      Returns:
      true if added, false if there is no space.

    • attack

      public void attack(Enemy enemy, int damage)
      Attacks an enemy directly (outside of the Fight record logic).
      Parameters:
      enemy - the enemy to attack.
      damage - the amount of damage.

    • move

      public MoveResult move(LinkedList<Room> path)
      Moves the hero along a path of rooms. Updates the hero's position to the next room in the path. * @param path the list of rooms constituting the path.
      Returns:
      a MoveResult containing the updated hero and the remaining path.

      Adds protection (shield) to the character.

      Parameters:
